concept.bonusPlusTitle: BonusPlus – How Your Reimbursement Rises to 100%
concept.bonusPlusNote: BonusPlus is available from age 21. A continuously maintained bonus booklet from your statutory health insurance fund is required.
concept.ikkComboText: The IKK bonus rewards health-conscious behavior with over €300 per year (tax-free). At a monthly premium of €13.50 (= €162/year), the bonus more than fully covers the costs. Additionally, the IKK health account reimburses up to €600 per year for dental cleanings and preventive care.
concept.vorversicherungText: The sum limit in the first year is completely waived if your previous insurance covered at least 40% of dental prosthetics. You start immediately with full coverage. Switching is especially worthwhile if you currently receive less than 90% reimbursement.

benefits.title: Dental Supplementary Insurance: What Statutory Insurance Doesn't Cover.
benefits.subtitle: Statutory health insurance only covers the standard care rate for dental prosthetics. You pay the rest yourself — or a smart supplementary insurance does.

noWait.title: No Waiting Periods
noWait.desc: Instant coverage from day 1. Professional dental cleaning and prophylaxis available immediately.

zahnersatz.title: Up to 100% Dental Prosthetics
zahnersatz.desc: Crowns, bridges, implants and inlays. With BonusPlus, reimbursement rises to up to 100%.

prophylaxe.title: Prophylaxis & Dental Cleaning
prophylaxe.desc: Professional dental cleaning, fissure sealing and prophylaxis included in all plans.

bleaching.title: Bleaching & Aesthetics
bleaching.desc: From the 70+ plan: Bleaching, pain management (nitrous oxide, hypnosis, acupuncture) included.

kfo.title: Orthodontics
kfo.desc: 50-90% reimbursement for children and adolescents. In case of accident, also for adults.

fehlend.title: Missing Teeth Insurable
fehlend.desc: Up to 3 already missing teeth can be insured. Only €5 risk surcharge per missing tooth.

unfall.title: Accident Instant Coverage
unfall.desc: No maximum limits and no age restrictions for dental damage caused by accidents.

gesundheitsfragen.title: Only 3 Health Questions
gesundheitsfragen.desc: Simple application. Maximum 3 health questions. Stably calculated and high-performing.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions — Answered Directly.
faq.subtitle: The most important facts at a glance. Clear and transparent.

items.q: How much does DentalUpgrade 90+ cost per month?
items.a: The DentalUpgrade 90+ plan starts at €13.50 per month without aging provisions. With aging provisions from €29.06. Combined with the IKK Classic bonus program (over €300 per year, tax-free), the insurance effectively pays for itself entirely. At just €162 annual premium and over €300 in bonus, you pay effectively €0.

items.q: How do I get from 90% to 100% reimbursement?
items.a: Through BonusPlus, your reimbursement increases automatically: From day 1, you receive 90% reimbursement. If you can show a continuously maintained bonus booklet from your health insurance fund, reimbursement rises to 95% after 5 years and to a full 100% after 10 years. BonusPlus is available from age 21. You don't need to apply for anything extra — proof of the bonus booklet is sufficient.

items.q: Can I get the insurance even with missing teeth?
items.a: Yes, this is a genuine unique selling point. Up to 3 already missing teeth can be co-insured. The risk surcharge is only €5 per missing tooth per month. Many other dental supplementary insurances reject customers with missing teeth entirely or exclude them from reimbursement.

No. Full insurance coverage applies immediately from day 1. Professional dental cleaning, prophylaxis, fissure sealing and all other benefits can be used right away. In the first calendar years, there is a sum limit of €1,000 (1st/2nd year), which is then lifted and becomes completely unlimited from the 5th calendar year.

items.q: I already have dental supplementary insurance. Is switching worth it?
items.a: Very likely yes, especially if you currently receive less than 90% reimbursement. Your big advantage: Prior insurance is credited. If your previous insurance covered at least 40% of dental prosthetics, the sum limit in the first calendar year is completely waived. So you start immediately with full coverage, not from zero.

DentalUpgrade 90+ reimburses 90 to 100 percent for: High-quality dental prosthetics such as implants, crowns, bridges and inlays. Dental treatments such as fillings, root canals, periodontitis and bite guards. Professional dental cleaning and fissure sealing (up to €180 per year). Bleaching and special pain management such as nitrous oxide, hypnosis or acupuncture. Orthodontics for children (90%, max. €2,500). Plus accident instant coverage without maximum limits.

items.q: How does it work together with the IKK Classic bonus?
items.a: The combination is the key: You take out DentalUpgrade 90+ (€13.50 per month = €162 per year). At the same time, as an IKK Classic member you collect bonus points for health-conscious behavior: vaccinations, dental check-ups, sports club, health screenings. The bonus amounts to over €300 per year, tax-free. Additionally, the IKK health account reimburses up to €600 per year for dental cleaning and preventive care. Result: Your dental coverage effectively costs you €0.

items.q: Do I need a health examination?
items.a: No, there is no extensive health examination. The application contains a maximum of 3 simple health questions. This makes the process quick and straightforward. Even with up to 3 missing teeth, you will be accepted (for a small risk surcharge of €5 per tooth).

Yes. For children, DentalUpgrade 90+ offers particularly strong coverage: Orthodontic treatments are reimbursed at 90%, up to a maximum of €2,500 for the entire contract period. Benefits are provided even for mild misalignments (KIG 1-5), not only from KIG 3 as with many competitors. The children's premium is €21.50 per month. Treatment must begin before the age of 18.

items.q: How was DentalUpgrade 90+ rated by independent testers?
items.a: DentalUpgrade 90+ was awarded VERY GOOD (0.8) by Stiftung Warentest and is the test winner in the 'Good and affordable' category (Finanzen, issue 07/2025). Additionally, the insurer received the 'Highest Customer Satisfaction' seal from Focus Money and the top rating 'Excellent' from Morgen und Morgen.

hero.title: No more high dental bills. <highlight>Secure private patient status</highlight> at the dentist.
hero.subtitle: Whether implants, crowns or professional dental cleaning: We cover the costs your health insurance fund doesn't pay.

problem.title: The Problem: Statutory Health Insurance Covers Almost Nothing
problem.text1: When things get serious at the dentist, it gets expensive. Statutory health insurance funds only pay a small fixed subsidy for dental prosthetics — often less than 50% of the most basic treatment.
problem.text2: High-quality implants, ceramic crowns or inlays must be paid for almost entirely out of pocket. A single bill can quickly amount to several thousand euros. Without supplementary insurance, you're stuck with these costs.

erstattung.title: 100% Reimbursement
erstattung.desc: We cover up to 100% of costs for high-quality dental prosthetics, inlays and implants. No more compromises on quality.

zahnreinigung.title: Dental Cleaning Included
zahnreinigung.desc: Professional dental cleaning as often as you like. We reimburse your prophylaxis costs — for a radiant smile.

sofortschutz.title: Instant Coverage
sofortschutz.desc: No waiting periods. Your insurance coverage begins immediately from day one. Submit invoices right away.

tariffFinder.title: Find the Plan That Is Guaranteed to Accept You.
tariffFinder.subtitle: Select your current dental status for a tailored offer.

optionHealthy.title: Everything healthy & complete
optionHealthy.desc: I have no missing teeth and no ongoing treatments.

option1Missing.title: 1 tooth currently missing
option1Missing.desc: I am currently missing one tooth (excluding wisdom teeth) that has not been replaced.

option2to3Missing.title: 2 to 3 teeth missing
option2to3Missing.desc: I am currently missing multiple teeth for which I need replacements.
